特記事項: 【合併】English Professional Writing A（総合政策学部）/英語プロフェッショナル・ライティングＡ（総合政策学部）
授業方法: This course includes face-to-face core lessons, as well as Start-up Week and Flex Hours on-demand lessons. The format of the face-to-face core lessons primarly consists of: weekly preparation assignments, mini lectures, peer and instructor feedback sessions, instructor-student consultations, small group presentations / discussions, research report drafting / revision, and individual academic presentations. NOTE 1: This is a challenging course. Active participation, weekly preparation, and engagement with tasks are required.NOTE 2: This course is intended to improve students’ academic English skills. Therefore, all materials, instruction,communications, and assignments are in English. Students are expected to only use English.

第1回:
[Startup Week] Online class (on-demand format) / 《90 min》 Course guidance
Visit the course LUNA website "Week 0 (Startup Period)" folder for the on-demand lecture link and materials:
https://luna.kwansei.ac.jp/lms/contents?idnumber=2026297011000201#courseContent
第15回: [Classes and Examinations Period] Week 1 (Face-to-face class) / 《90 min》
トピック.授業計画1:
*13 sessions are planned for face-to-face format.

Course content includes weekly preparation, in-class practice, and guided support for:
 - Topic selection and research question development
 - Article search and evaluation
 - Slide design and speaking practice
 - Article summarizing, response, and discussion
 - Written report drafting and revision
 - Final academic presentation

A detailed schedule will be distributed in the first class.
トピック.授業外学習2:
Student preparation outside of class meetings includes:
(1) Completely weekly preparation assignments
(2) Conducting literature research to find suitable academic articles
(3) Carefully reading academic articles and completing preparation tasks
(5) Preparation for academic presentations
(6) Writing, using peer and instructor feedback, and revising research report drafts

学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Writing assignments, including drafts and revisions
成績評価Grading2: Active weekly participation, article presentations / discussions, individual academic presentation
